evals.name: leo-cubesat-sizing
evals.prompt: Perform an EPS assessment for a 6U CubeSat in a 500km LEO orbit. Average load is 40W, peak is 60W. Mission life is 3 years. Use Triple Junction cells (30% eff) and assume a 40% DOD for the battery to ensure long cycle life. Calculate required solar array area and battery capacity in Wh.
evals.expected_output: Solar array area around 0.15-0.2 m^2 and battery capacity around 100-120 Wh depending on efficiency assumptions.

evals.name: lunar-lander-sizing
evals.prompt: Size the power system for a small lunar lander. The lander needs 200W constant power during the 14-day lunar day. It must survive the 14-day lunar night in a low-power mode (20W) using only batteries. Use a 80% DOD for the lunar night (single cycle). Solar flux is 1367 W/m^2. Calculate array size for day ops and battery size for night survival.
evals.expected_output: Very large battery required (around 8-10 kWh) and modest solar array (around 1 m^2) to support day ops and recharging.

evals.name: basic-leo-battery
evals.prompt: Size a battery for a 50W average load in LEO (35 min eclipse) with a max 30% DoD. Use 95% discharge efficiency.
evals.expected_output: Calculation showing ~102.3 Wh required battery capacity.
